heading: Enterprise for the Americas Board
label: 2430h Enterprise for the Americas Board
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior , pt. IV, , , amended , prior to repeal by , pt. IV, § 401, , , except insofar as section 709 affected section 279a.section 709 of Pub. L. 87–19575 Stat. 465section 279a of this titlePub. L. 87–56576 Stat. 263Sept. 4, 1961Aug. 1, 1962
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior , pt. IV, , , amended , prior to repeal by , pt. IV, § 401, , , except insofar as section 709 affected section 279a.section 709 of Pub. L. 87–19575 Stat. 465section 279a of this titlePub. L. 87–56576 Stat. 263Sept. 4, 1961Aug. 1, 1962

children.text: advise the Secretary of State on the negotiations of Americas Framework Agreements;

children.label: A
children.text: the government of the beneficiary country,

children.label: B
children.text: nongovernmental organizations of the beneficiary country,

children.label: C
children.text: nongovernmental organizations of the region (if appropriate),

children.label: D
children.text: environmental, scientific, child survival and child development, and academic leaders of the beneficiary country, and

children.label: E
children.text: environmental, scientific, child survival and child development, and academic leaders of the region (as appropriate),
review the programs, operations, and fiscal audits of each administering body.
